title: Regulator of Social Housing - Annual Report and Accounts 2023-24
body: "This overview provides information on the Regulator of Social Housing:   our main objectives and activities for the period from 1 April 2023 to 31 March 2024 the key risks we face and our approach to them a summary of how we have performed during the period. the composition and organisation of our governance structures remuneration and staff details Parliamentary accountability documents financial statements.   RSH’s previous reports are listed on the annual reports and accounts page.  "

taxons.title: Housing for older and vulnerable people
